title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Heritage Foods Retail - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Heritage Foods Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Heritage Foods Retail:
Heritage Foods Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Heritage Foods Retail!
